policy: Machine-readable color, material, lighting, symbol, composition, and low-magic data for F001-F006. Image boards must visualize swatches/samples without readable text labels; downstream prompts may cite token IDs and HEX values as metadata, not as visible image text.

earth_brown.usage: 残阳坳、山路、旧麻、泥墙、旧皮底色

wheat_gold.usage: 麦田、粮牌、旧粮仓、褪色布边

herb_green.usage: 药户、内层衣、草药袋、旧驿山谷

river_teal.usage: 金河、渡口、蒸汽生产线、湿木阴影

insect_wax_white.usage: 清明院白墙、虫蜡封条、记忆室、白册工具

bone_white.role: cold institutional or northern bone accent
bone_white.usage: 肃明骨白、北境骨器、雪中骨饰

pearl_gray.usage: 清明院阴影、无尘墙面、白册纸边

black_sun.usage: 黑日、审讯桌阴影、虫族中枢标记

blackstone.usage: 边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口

snow_white.usage: 雪线、冻风、山口高光、北境远景

ice_cyan.usage: 雪影、冰湖、北风、高寒阴影

dry_blood.usage: 边墙旧血、甲片裂痕、拒马伤痕

paper_ash.usage: 灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面

cracked_copper.usage: 旧星图、残铜边、书院机关裂纹

old_white_stone.usage: 白曜旧都、旧驿白石、月下旧驿石台

zhu_red.usage: 昭明旗布、旧帝国残纹、遗迹红边

lapis_blue.usage: 旧帝国星图、宫城残片、少量礼制色

worn_gold.usage: 旧昭明金属边、令牌、磨损凸纹

relay_gold_red.usage: 旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化

frozen_earth.usage: 北境冻土、兽群迁徙路、风蚀灰土

dry_grass.usage: 北境枯草、草坡、血盐袋、迁徙草场

old_wood.surface: grain-visible old timber with smoke, hand oil, and water stains
old_wood.reflectance: low, broken satin only on handled edges
old_wood.wear_rules: chips, soot at corners, rubbed pale edges, never varnished modern wood
old_wood.usage: 残阳坳门框、金河码头、水轮、旧驿梁木

insect_wax.surface: smooth wax-sealed institutional surface with faint cloudy translucency
insect_wax.reflectance: soft waxy highlights, no glossy plastic
insect_wax.wear_rules: sealed seams, pressed black-sun marks, needle scratches, dustless violence
insect_wax.usage: 清明院墙面、封条、记忆针、白册章

blackstone_snow.surface: coarse black stone with snow packed into cracks
blackstone_snow.reflectance: very low, wet edge glints only
blackstone_snow.wear_rules: frost cracks, wind-polished corners, dry blood in cuts, snow accumulation on ledges
blackstone_snow.usage: 边墙、锁喉关、寒鸦堡、绝境山脉

wet_wood_steam.surface: wet river wood, iron grime, steam condensation
wet_wood_steam.reflectance: low on wood, dull on iron, white steam glow only as haze
wet_wood_steam.wear_rules: water tide marks, oil black smears, rope stains, softened edges
wet_wood_steam.usage: 金河粮磨、水泵、码头、粮仓生产线

bone_iron_hide.surface: bone, dull iron, hide, fur, rope and blood-salt wear
bone_iron_hide.reflectance: very low except worn iron scratches
bone_iron_hide.wear_rules: stitched repairs, bite marks, salt bloom, cracked leather, bone polish at grip points
bone_iron_hide.usage: 北境盾鼓、皮帐、兽具、骨笛、攻城兵种

paper_ash_copper.surface: charred paper, ash dust, cracked copper, brittle seal fragments
paper_ash_copper.reflectance: copper has dull broken glints only
paper_ash_copper.wear_rules: burnt edges, ash transfer, copper verdigris, moon-white dust on ridges
paper_ash_copper.usage: 灰烬书院、碎星图、封条、禁书残页

herb_linen.surface: rough linen with herb stains, sweat, smoke and field dust
herb_linen.wear_rules: frayed seams, patched elbows, herb-powder smears, soot on corners
herb_linen.usage: 猎户、药户、山路护送、旧驿后裔服装

worn_gold.surface: old raised metal with exposed warm gold on edges only
worn_gold.reflectance: muted glint on raised cuts, no polished palace shine
worn_gold.wear_rules: edge wear, blackened recesses, cracked enamel, missing flakes
worn_gold.usage: 昭明令牌、旧帝国遗迹、日月残纹、盟书印记

lighting_rules.usage: 逃亡、村落、边墙外景；保留真实体重和接触阴影
门缝火光、火烧残阳坳、炭火；只照亮局部因果
清明院和白册场景；白不是圣洁，是制度暴力
旧驿短促反应，不许满屏魔法

F005.palette_display_policy: Render composition thumbnails and prop/hand/silhouette blocks visually; do not render labels, grids, numbers, or captions.

雪线、冻风、山口高光、北境远景

金河、渡口、蒸汽生产线、湿木阴影

旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化

composition_templates.rule: fire is local cause, not full-screen spectacle

composition_templates.key_readable_area: prop and fingers occupy 18-24% frame height
composition_templates.rule: story prop readable before beauty shot

composition_templates.key_readable_area: bell or bone object in lower-mid third, vibration debris around contact point
composition_templates.rule: sound and vibration shown by local contact cause

composition_templates.key_readable_area: horn/silhouette enters from edge 20-35% width, humans small but not unreadable
composition_templates.rule: show scale through partial body and impact, not full monster splash

composition_templates.key_readable_area: needle/wax/contact patch 20-28% height near upper or center third
hand, cracked stair edge and falling debris form diagonal from lower third to upper third
composition_templates.rule: action consequence must be visible in contact point

composition_templates.key_readable_area: body path diagonal 60-75% frame height with snow spray at feet/hands
composition_templates.rule: weight and friction visible; no floating slow motion

F006.palette_display_policy: Render light as local glow samples on skin, cloth, stone and route marks; do not render labels, runic text, UI, or hex codes.

color_palette.usage: 旧驿路线光、日月残纹、短促低魔显化
旧昭明金属边、令牌、磨损凸纹
昭明旗布、旧帝国残纹、遗迹红边
白曜旧都、旧驿白石、月下旧驿石台
边墙、寒鸦堡、锁喉关、黑石山口
灰烬书院、旧纸、焦黑书架尘面
清明院白墙、虫蜡封条、记忆室、白册工具
旧驿残光熄灭边缘
路线光最亮边缘，只可局部出现

light_tokens.rule: 贴着皮肤和衣料裂纹出现，不形成大翅膀
局部路线反应，不照亮整场

light_tokens.duration_hint: still image only or short glint
light_tokens.rule: 旧债感和磨损金，不是神圣胜利光
只证明旧驿仍有残响，不解决危机

forbidden_magic_rules: no neon blue-violet fantasy spell flood
no magic solution replacing physical action
